title: Sparked
description: this is a modpack designed to add many realism features and other things
body:
![this is the logo of sparked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0e214bc366e029d311fd0b44d531a08d65c7b82.png)
Welcome to sparked the modpack where you will spend way to much time making iron tools
________________________________________________________________________________________________
**features**
- New player animations
- Realistic start on your journey
- Artifacts
- Realistic forging
- Over 80 biomes
- New weapons
- Thirst bar
- Temperature system
- Better splashes in water
- And so much more
________________________________________________________________________________________________
If you like realism this is the modpack for you
